description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages prepare, build, test, and deploy, defining CONTAINER_APP and CONTAINER_BASE variables that point to registry.gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_PATH/app and /base, and using ruby:2.5 as the global image. In the prepare stage add a build_base_container_latest job (docker:stable image with docker:dind service, only when files under container/base/* change on the default branch) that runs docker login to registry.gitlab.com, builds the base Dockerfile tagging $CONTAINER_BASE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA and $CONTAINER_BASE:latest, and pushes both tags; also add a build_base_container_testing job (same image/service, runs on non‑default branches when container/base/* changes) that builds and pushes $CONTAINER_BASE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA and $CONTAINER_BASE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG. In the build stage add a build_release job (docker:stable with docker:dind, only on tags) that logs in, pulls $CONTAINER_BASE:latest and $CONTAINER_POSTGRES:latest if they exist, builds the base and postgres images using --cache-from latest, tags them with $CI_COMMIT_TAG and latest, and pushes the new tags. In the test stage add a test job (registry.gitlab.com/iskcrew/isk/base image, services redis:latest and postgres:9.6) that runs ruby -v, copies configuration files, runs bundle install, then executes RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rake db:setup, isk:secrets, db:test:prepare and rake test, storing the coverage/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add three jobs: build_app_container_latest (docker:stable with docker:dind, only on master) that logs in, builds the app Dockerfile tagging $CONTAINER_APP:$CI_COMMIT_SHA and :latest and pushes both; build_app_container_release (only on tags) that pulls the latest app image, builds with --cache-from latest tagging $CONTAINER_APP:$CI_COMMIT_TAG and :latest and pushes them; and build_app_container_testing (runs on non‑default branches) that builds and pushes $CONTAINER_APP:$CI_COMMIT_SHA and $CONTAINER_APP:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG. All container jobs use the docker:dind service and push images to the GitLab Container Registry.
